name: v2 bulk SSH success from single source
description: Five or more successful sshd authentications from a single source.ip within 10 minutes. Authorized config-mgmt + CI/CD push activity matches this shape (svc.config-mgmt and svc.deploy hitting their target fleets in a burst); credential-spray-with-hits and post-compromise lateral movement also match. Triage answers which identity drove the burst, whether the source host is in CMDB as a fleet-push role (config-mgmt-1, ci-1), and whether the burst correlates with a change-mgmt window.
